G185.derivation: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a presumed derivative of G2767 (κεράννυμι);

G127.derivation: perhaps from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G1492 (εἴδω) (through the idea of downcast eyes);
G127.strongs_def: bashfulness, i.e. (towards men), modesty or (towards God) awe

G106.derivation: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G2219 (ζύμη);
G106.strongs_def: unleavened, i.e. (figuratively) uncorrupted; (in the neutral plural) specially (by implication) the Passover week

G165.strongs_def: properly, an age; by extension, perpetuity (also past); by implication, the world; specially (Jewish) a Messianic period (present or future)
G165.kjv_def: age, course, eternal, (for) ever(-more), (n-)ever, (beginning of the , while the) world (began, without end)

G199.derivation: adverb from the same as G196 (ἀκριβέστατος);

G170.derivation: from a compound of G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G2540 (καιρός) (meaning unseasonable);
G170.strongs_def: to be inopportune (for oneself), i.e. to fail of a proper occasion

G121.derivation: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and probably a derivative of G5087 (τίθημι) (meaning a penalty);

G184.derivation: of Chaldee origin (meaning field of blood;
G184.strongs_def: corresponding to H02506 and H01818); Akeldama, a place near Jerusalem

G135.derivation: from a derivative of G136 (αἶνος) (in its primary sense);

G139.strongs_def: properly, a choice, i.e. (specially) a party or (abstractly) disunion
G139.kjv_def: heresy (which is the Greek word itself), sect

G183.derivation: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a derivative of G2722 (κατέχω);

G138.strongs_def: to take for oneself, i.e. to prefer

G189.strongs_def: hearing (the act, the sense or the thing heard)
G189.kjv_def: audience, ear, fame, which ye heard, hearing, preached, report, rumor
G189.usage: hearing(10x), ears(4x), fame(3x), rumour(2x), report(2x), audience(1x)

G156.strongs_def: a cause (as if asked for), i.e. (logical) reason (motive, matter), (legal) crime (alleged or proved)

G154.kjv_def: ask, beg, call for, crave, desire, require

G178.derivation: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a derivative of G2632 (κατακρίνω);

G128.derivation: from (to scorch) and (the face, from G3700 (ὀπτάνομαι));

G180.derivation: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a derivative of G2664 (καταπαύω);

G113.derivation: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a derivative of G5087 (τίθημι) (in the sense of enacting);

G187.strongs_def: to make a point, i.e. (figuratively) mature

G126.strongs_def: everduring (forward and backward, or forward only)

G188.derivation: accusative case of a noun ("acme") akin to (a point) and meaning the same;

G137.derivation: of Hebrew origin (a derivative of G5869, place of springs);

G116.derivation: plural of (the goddess of wisdom, who was reputed to have founded the city);

G142.strongs_def: to lift up; by implication, to take up or away; figuratively, to raise (the voice), keep in suspense (the mind), specially, to sail away (i.e. weigh anchor); by Hebraism (compare H05375) to expiate sin
G142.kjv_def: away with, bear (up), carry, lift up, loose, make to doubt, put away, remove, take (away, up)

G171.derivation: adverb from the same as G170 (ἀκαιρέομαι);

G130.derivation: from G129 (αἷμα) and a derivative of G1632 (ἐκχέω);

G110.derivation: from a compound of G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G2288 (θάνατος);

G124.strongs_def: an Ægyptian or inhabitant of Ægyptus

G164.derivation: from (a spear) and a derivative of the same as G259 (ἅλωσις);
G164.strongs_def: properly, a prisoner of war, i.e. (genitive case) a captive

G175.derivation: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G2590 (καρπός);

G120.derivation: from a compound of G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G2372 (θυμός);

G191.kjv_def: give (in the) audience (of), come (to the ears), (shall) hear(-er, -ken), be noised, be reported, understand

G118.derivation: from (a contest in the public lists);
G118.strongs_def: to contend in the competitive games

G133.strongs_def: a praising (the act), i.e. (specially) a thank(-offering)

G196.derivation: superlative of (a derivative of the same as G206 (ἄκρον));

G179.derivation: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a derivative of G2647 (καταλύω);

G190.derivation: from G1 (Α) (as a particle of union) and (a road);
G190.strongs_def: properly, to be in the same way with, i.e. to accompany (specially, as a disciple)

G109.strongs_def: by analogy, to blow); "air" (as naturally circumambient)

G160.derivation: from a compound of G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G5316 (φαίνω) (compare G1810 (ἐξαίφνης)) (meaning non-apparent);

G176.derivation: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a derivative of G2607 (καταγινώσκω);

G111.derivation: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a derivative of (statute;
G111.strongs_def: from the base of G5087 (τίθημι)); illegal; by implication, flagitious

G186.derivation: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G2827 (κλίνω);

G193.derivation: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G2904 (κράτος);

G194.derivation: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a presumed derivative of G2767 (κεράννυμι);

G169.derivation: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a presumed derivative of G2508 (καθαίρω) (meaning cleansed);

G102.derivation: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G1415 (δυνατός);
G102.strongs_def: unable, i.e. weak (literally or figuratively); passively, impossible
G102.kjv_def: could not do, impossible, impotent, not possible, weak

G117.strongs_def: an Athenæan or inhabitant of Athenæ

G129.strongs_def: blood, literally (of men or animals), figuratively (the juice of grapes) or specially (the atoning blood of Christ); by implication, bloodshed, also kindred

G123.derivation: from (to rush) and G251 (ἅλς) (in the sense of the sea;
G123.strongs_def: a beach (on which the waves dash)

G145.strongs_def: properly, an organ of perception, i.e. (figuratively) judgment

G112.derivation: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G2316 (θεός);

G177.derivation: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a derivative of a compound of G2596 (κατά) and G2572 (καλύπτω);

G155.strongs_def: a thing asked or (abstractly) an asking

G114.derivation: from a compound of G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a derivative of G5087 (τίθημι);
G114.strongs_def: to set aside, i.e. (by implication) to disesteem, neutralize or violate
G114.kjv_def: cast off, despise, disannul, frustrate, bring to nought, reject

G166.strongs_def: perpetual (also used of past time, or past and future as well)

G163.kjv_def: lead away captive, bring into captivity

G104.derivation: from an obsolete primary noun (apparently meaning continued duration);
G104.strongs_def: "ever," by qualification regularly; by implication, earnestly

G172.derivation: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and G2556 (κακός);
G172.strongs_def: not bad, i.e. (objectively) innocent or (subjectively) unsuspecting

G197.derivation: neuter of the comparative of the same as G196 (ἀκριβέστατος);

G182.derivation: from G1 (Α) (as a negative particle) and a derivative of G2525 (καθίστημι);

G131.strongs_def: to flow blood, i.e. have a hæmorrhage
G131.kjv_def: diseased with an issue of blood

G173.derivation: probably from the same as G188 (ἀκμήν);

G136.strongs_def: properly, a story, but used in the sense of G1868 (ἔπαινος); praise (of God)

G125.strongs_def: Ægyptus, the land of the Nile

G108.strongs_def: Azotus (i.e. Ashdod), a place in Palestine
